response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there’s minimal evidence of executive-level leadership, architectural oversight, or direct client advisory experience, which are critical for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
Lacks clear evidence of leading teams at an executive level or managing client-facing architecture decisions
No demonstrated experience in IT security, compliance, or risk management — key requirements in the job description
